questions.q: Which country was selected to headquarter the new multinational Defence, Security and Resilience Bank (DSRB) for NATO allies?
During a White House dinner, who playfully reminded U.S. President Donald Trump that he is Canada's head of state?
During a 90-minute call with U.S. President Donald Trump on Ukraine, Vladimir Putin proposed a ceasefire for which Russian holiday?
Ex-FBI Director James Comey surrendered to federal court in April 2026 to face charges of threatening the President's life through what type of social media post?
options: An Instagram photo of seashells arranged as '86 47'
A TikTok video of him burning a presidential seal
An X post displaying a digital painting of the White House in ruins
A Facebook live stream reading a hostile manifesto
questions.correctText: An Instagram photo of seashells arranged as '86 47'

questions.q: Oyster growers in which Canadian province reported a nearly 100% mortality rate as MSX and dermo diseases devastated the industry?
A man from which country was sentenced to four years in prison in late April 2026 for orchestrating a massive 'swatting' spree targeting dozens of U.S. government officials?
U.S. President Donald Trump announced the U.S. is reviewing a reduction of its troops in Germany after a clash with which German Chancellor?
In April 2026, Jerome Powell announced he would continue to serve as a Federal Reserve governor even after his chairmanship ends, citing what specific reason?
options: To see through an ongoing renovation probe
To oversee the rollout of a digital dollar
To launch a nationwide educational tour
To lead a transition to a new monetary standard
questions.correctText: To see through an ongoing renovation probe

questions.q: To strengthen its bid for a lucrative Canadian submarine contract, a company from which country pledged to manufacture armoured vehicles in Canada?

Released on April 30, 2026, the 'State of the World's Fathers' report by Equimundo highlighted a global caregiving strain, revealing that what percentage of fathers say they aren't getting the parenting support they need?
